requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Lebanese Civil Defence and the Real-World Fire Risk of Rapid, Informal Battery Deployments
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——黎巴嫩民防及快速非正式电池部署的真实消防风险
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——黎巴嫩民防及快速非正式電池部署的真實消防風險

summary.en: The Lebanese Civil Defence (under the Ministry of Interior) is the authority having jurisdiction for fire safety in Lebanon. Lebanon does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS-specific fire-installation regulation equivalent to NFPA 855 or IEC 62933-5-2 enforcement at the installation level. However, the fire safety context for Lebanon BESS is critically important and distinctive: Lebanon's chronic electricity shortage and grid collapse have driven extremely rapid, often informal or minimally supervised installation of battery storage systems — ranging from small residential lithium units to larger commercial systems — frequently by non-specialist installers in confined residential spaces with limited ventilation. This environment creates materially elevated fire and thermal-runaway risk. Documented fire incidents involving lithium battery storage systems in Lebanon and the region underscore the urgency of fire-safe product selection, installation design, and ventilation. LCEC and international donors have promoted standards-compliant solar-plus-storage systems under Lebanon's National Energy Efficiency Action Plan. For any significant commercial or industrial BESS installation, Lebanese Civil Defence installation approval should be obtained. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based energy storage systems) is the internationally expected system-level safety standard and should be referenced in project and installation documentation.
summary.zh: 黎巴嫩民防部（隶属于内政部）是黎巴嫩消防安全的主管机关。黎巴嫩没有经确认的、与NFPA 855或IEC 62933-5-2在安装层面执行相当的独立强制性BESS专属消防安装法规。然而，黎巴嫩BESS的消防安全背景至关重要且具有鲜明特色：黎巴嫩长期电力短缺和电网崩溃推动了储能系统的极为快速、往往非正式或监管极少的安装——从小型住宅锂电池装置到较大的商业系统——通常由非专业安装人员在通风有限的局促住宅空间内完成。这一环境造成实质性上升的火灾和热失控风险。黎巴嫩及该地区有据可查的锂电池储能系统火灾事件凸显了消防安全产品选型、安装设计和通风的紧迫性。LCEC和国际捐助方在黎巴嫩国家能源效率行动计划下推广了符合标准的光储系统。对于任何重要的商业或工业BESS装置，应取得黎巴嫩民防安装审批。IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）是国际预期的系统级安全标准，应在项目和安装文件中加以引用。
summary.zht: 黎巴嫩民防部（隸屬於內政部）是黎巴嫩消防安全的主管機關。黎巴嫩沒有經確認的、與NFPA 855或IEC 62933-5-2在安裝層面執行相當的獨立強制性BESS專屬消防安裝法規。然而，黎巴嫩BESS的消防安全背景至關重要且具有鮮明特色：黎巴嫩長期電力短缺和電網崩潰推動了儲能系統的極為快速、往往非正式或監管極少的安裝——從小型住宅鋰電池裝置到較大的商業系統——通常由非專業安裝人員在通風有限的局促住宅空間內完成。這一環境造成實質性上升的火災和熱失控風險。黎巴嫩及該地區有據可查的鋰電池儲能系統火災事件凸顯了消防安全產品選型、安裝設計和通風的緊迫性。LCEC和國際捐助方在黎巴嫩國家能源效率行動計畫下推廣了符合標準的光儲系統。對於任何重要的商業或工業BESS裝置，應取得黎巴嫩民防安裝審批。IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）是國際預期的系統級安全標準，應在項目和安裝文件中加以引用。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (internationally expected system-level fire and safety standard for BESS installations)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (cell/module-level safety baseline relevant to fire-safe product selection)
IEC 62133 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (relevant for smaller residential battery units)
Lebanese Civil Defence — authority having jurisdiction for fire safety installation approval in Lebanon
LCEC — Lebanese Centre for Energy Conservation (energy policy and standards-compliant solar-plus-storage promotion; lcec.org.lb)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 (effective August 1, 2025) includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36558-2023 covers system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Lebanese Civil Defence as equivalent to Lebanese fire-safety installation requirements. However, Chinese manufacturers who have obtained IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 certification from accredited laboratories will have relevant fire-safety evidence that is internationally recognisable — the gap is ensuring this evidence is available and used in the Lebanese installation documentation, not just the Chinese domestic compliance record.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起生效）包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被黎巴嫩民防认可为等同于黎巴嫩消防安全安装要求。然而，已从认可实验室取得IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2认证的中国制造商将拥有国际认可的相关消防安全证据——差距在于确保这些证据在黎巴嫩安装文件中可用并被使用，而非仅存于中国国内合规记录中。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起生效）包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被黎巴嫩民防認可為等同於黎巴嫩消防安全安裝要求。然而，已從認可實驗室取得IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2認證的中國製造商將擁有國際認可的相關消防安全證據——差距在於確保這些證據在黎巴嫩安裝文件中可用並被使用，而非僅存於中國國內合規記錄中。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Lebanese Civil Defence installation approval is the mandatory fire-safety gate for commercial and industrial BESS installations in Lebanon. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Lebanese requirements. Critically, Lebanon's distinctive market context — rapid, often informal residential and small-commercial battery installations by non-specialist installers — creates materially elevated fire risk that goes beyond regulatory compliance: exporters and importers have an ethical and commercial responsibility to supply only products with credible IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 safety certification and to support appropriate installation guidance. Exporters and project teams should: (a) supply only BESS products with IEC 62619 type-test certificates from ILAC-accredited laboratories; (b) provide installation documentation including thermal-runaway mitigation guidance, ventilation requirements, separation distances, and emergency shutdown procedures in Arabic and English; (c) obtain Lebanese Civil Defence installation approval for any commercial or industrial project; (d) engage LCEC resources or qualified local fire-safety engineers for installation guidance in the residential and small-commercial segment; (e) be explicit with distributors and installers about the fire risks of improper installation in confined, poorly-ventilated spaces.
gap.zh: 差距：黎巴嫩民防安装审批是黎巴嫩商业及工业BESS装置的强制消防安全门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足黎巴嫩要求。至关重要的是，黎巴嫩独特的市场背景——由非专业安装人员快速安装、往往非正式的住宅和小型商业电池装置——造成实质性上升的火灾风险，超越了法规合规层面：出口商和进口商有道德和商业责任，仅供应持有可信IEC 62619和IEC 62133安全认证的产品，并支持适当的安装指导。出口商和项目团队应：（a）仅供应持有来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62619型式试验证书的BESS产品；（b）提供包含热失控缓解指南、通风要求、隔离距离和紧急停机程序的安装文件（阿拉伯语和英语）；（c）为任何商业或工业项目取得黎巴嫩民防安装审批；（d）在住宅和小型商业领域聘请LCEC资源或合格的当地消防安全工程师提供安装指导；（e）向分销商和安装人员明确说明在局促、通风不良空间不当安装的消防风险。
gap.zht: 差距：黎巴嫩民防安裝審批是黎巴嫩商業及工業BESS裝置的強制消防安全門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足黎巴嫩要求。至關重要的是，黎巴嫩獨特的市場背景——由非專業安裝人員快速安裝、往往非正式的住宅和小型商業電池裝置——造成實質性上升的火災風險，超越了法規合規層面：出口商和進口商有道德和商業責任，僅供應持有可信IEC 62619和IEC 62133安全認證的產品，並支持適當的安裝指導。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）僅供應持有來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62619型式試驗證書的BESS產品；（b）提供包含熱失控緩解指南、通風要求、隔離距離和緊急停機程序的安裝文件（阿拉伯語和英語）；（c）為任何商業或工業項目取得黎巴嫩民防安裝審批；（d）在住宅和小型商業領域聘請LCEC資源或合格的當地消防安全工程師提供安裝指導；（e）向分銷商和安裝人員明確說明在局促、通風不良空間不當安裝的消防風險。

mandatory_status.target: Lebanese Civil Defence installation approval is mandatory for commercial and industrial facilities; a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS-specific fire installation regulation has not been identified from official sources as of the dataset date — verify directly with Lebanese Civil Defence. Fire safety is a critical practical requirement given Lebanon's rapid, informal battery installation environment.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: Lebanese Centre for Energy Conservation (LCEC) — energy policy and solar/storage standards promotion under Lebanon Ministry of Energy and Water

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lebanese Civil Defence fire-safety approval is the mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS in Lebanon. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Lebanese requirements. Beyond regulatory compliance, Lebanon's distinctive context of rapid, often informal battery installations by non-specialist installers in confined spaces creates materially elevated fire and thermal-runaway risk — exporters and importers should supply only IEC 62619-certified products and ensure Arabic/English installation guidance covers ventilation, thermal-runaway mitigation, and emergency procedures. Engage Lebanese Civil Defence and a qualified fire-safety professional for any commercial or industrial project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 黎巴嫩民防消防安全审批是黎巴嫩商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足黎巴嫩要求。超越法规合规层面，黎巴嫩非专业安装人员在局促空间快速、往往非正式安装电池的独特背景造成实质性上升的火灾和热失控风险——出口商和进口商应仅供应IEC 62619认证产品，并确保阿拉伯语/英语安装指导涵盖通风、热失控缓解和应急程序。对于任何商业或工业项目，应聘请黎巴嫩民防和合格消防安全专业人员。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 黎巴嫩民防消防安全審批是黎巴嫩商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足黎巴嫩要求。超越法規合規層面，黎巴嫩非專業安裝人員在局促空間快速、往往非正式安裝電池的獨特背景造成實質性上升的火災和熱失控風險——出口商和進口商應僅供應IEC 62619認證產品，並確保阿拉伯語/英語安裝指導涵蓋通風、熱失控緩解和應急程序。對於任何商業或工業項目，應聘請黎巴嫩民防和合格消防安全專業人員。
